item.name: Lale Crab
item.description:
A king among gwl crabs, and lord of the shores of Yedlihmad.

[Suitable for printing on medium canvases.]

fish.guide: Among the rosaceous gwl crabs clustered along Thavnair's shores may be found brighter and more keenly shaped specimens─distinctive blooms all their own. So elegant are their wine-colored carapaces and delicate steps that any noblewoman of Radz-at-Han treasures the gift of a lale crab above that of its namesake tulip, integrity of her suitors' digits be damned.

obj.n: Tome of Ichthyological Folklore - Ilsabard and the Northern Empty
